<!-- this file is generated during the document build stage -->

<!-- #region regex-hex -->
```ts
// flexible
/^\s*#?(?:([0-9a-h])([0-9a-h])([0-9a-h])|([0-9a-h]{2})([0-9a-h]{2})([0-9a-h]{2})(\d{2})?)\s*$/i
```
```ts
// strict
/^\s*#(?:([0-9a-h])([0-9a-h])([0-9a-h])|([0-9a-h]{2})([0-9a-h]{2})([0-9a-h]{2})(\d{2})?)\s*$/i
```
<!-- #endregion regex-hex -->

<!-- #region regex-hsl -->
```ts
/^\s*hsla?\(\s*(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(deg|turn)?\s*[,\s]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s*[,\s]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?(?:\s*[,\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```
<!-- #endregion regex-hsl -->

<!-- #region regex-hwb -->
```ts
/^\s*hwb\(\s*(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(deg|turn)?\s*[,\s]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s*[,\s]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?(?:\s*[,\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```
<!-- #endregion regex-hwb -->

<!-- #region regex-lab -->
```ts
/^\s*lab\(\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?(?:\s*[\s\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```
<!-- #endregion regex-lab -->

<!-- #region regex-lch -->
```ts
/^\s*lch\(\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%|deg)?(?:\s*[\s\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```
<!-- #endregion regex-lch -->

<!-- #region regex-oklab -->
```ts
/^\s*oklab\(\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?(?:\s*[\s\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```
<!-- #endregion regex-oklab -->

<!-- #region regex-oklch -->
```ts
/^\s*oklch\(\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s+(\-?\d*\.?\d+|none)(%|deg)?(?:\s*[\s\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```

<!-- #region regex-rgb -->
```ts
/^\s*rgba?\(\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s*[,\s]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?\s*[,\s]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?(?:\s*[,\/]\s*(\d*\.?\d+|none)(%)?)?\s*\)\s*$/i
```

```ts
export const hex = [
    
    // without alpha
    "#f8c",
    "f8c",
    "#ff88cc",
```

### HSL

```ts

    // none keywords

    "hsl( -172.08 68.187% 35.2% )",
    "hsl( -172.08deg 68.187% 35.2% )",
    "hsl( -0.478turn 68.187% 35.2% )",
    "hsl(-172.08,0.68187,0.352)",
```
